title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 24 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 24 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 24 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 24/04/2025
Today, the DCE iron ore futures moved downwards after a higher opening and remained in the doldrums throughout the day. The most-tradedcontract I2509 finally closed at 720.5, with a daily decline of 0.28%. Traders followed the market to sell goods.
